name: pagespeed-bulk-scanner
description: Optional Node engines for the PageSpeed Bulk Scanner: PDF export (html-to-pdf.js) and the local Lighthouse engine (lighthouse-runner.js, --engine=local). Driven by pagespeed_scanner.php; the default PSI scan is pure PHP and needs none of this.

scripts.postinstall: echo '\nNext (only needed for PDF export): install the browser engine ->  npx playwright install chromium\n'
